_purpose: Build provenance. source_commit and artifact_hash are populated by a future build step, not by hand; they are null until that step exists.
build_command: .github/workflows/ci.yml: no build tooling exists (no bundler, no transpiler); the deployed artifact is the checked-out working tree itself, served as vanilla ESM static files, after every build/check-*.mjs passes and app/fixtures/ is confirmed reproducible by regenerating and diffing against the committed content.
artifact_hash_note: No single artifact hash applies while there is no build step compiling source into output; the deployed tree is the source tree, verified file-by-file by the check suite rather than by one compiled-artifact hash. See trellis/sorry-ledger.md SK-14.
